title: Fiber Splice Restoration - Springfield Business Park
description: Restore 24-count feeder splice after cabinet damage and verify light levels for affected tenants. A utility vehicle struck the fiber cabinet at the northwest corner of the building parking structure, shearing the 24-count SM feeder at approximately 3 m from the splice enclosure. Fourteen tenant circuits are currently down. Technician must expose the damaged section, re-splice all affected fibers, reseal the enclosure, and confirm restore of signal for each affected circuit before closure.
